## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic growth is healthy, with clicks steadily increasing despite impression fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include agentic AI topics and align with Siit's positioning as a modern service desk](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Website optimization needed to improve conversion of increased traffic into trials and demos](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Collaboration planned on developing a systematic content roadmap for the quarter](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Impressions recovered quickly after Sept 10th Google change, unlike many other sites](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Clicks growing steadily, though not at same rate as impressions (expected due to "great decoupling")](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Healthy organic growth since mid-July, both for GrowthX content and site-wide](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Further analysis needed on non-GrowthX landing pages and overall organic performance](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Expanding focus to include agentic AI topics, with examples compiled for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Developing roadmap for editorial pieces to align with new "modern service desk" positioning](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Planning systematic approach to keyword research and content clustering](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Considering competitive content (e.g., alternatives, comparisons) in response to Salesforce's IT space entry](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### Website Optimization for Conversion

  - [Traffic increase not yet translating to proportional growth in trials/demos](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Plans to refine messaging across multiple pages to better convey Siit's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Emphasis on explaining data centralization, workflow improvements, and cross-department applicability](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Identified quick wins (e.g., adding free trial button to blog posts) to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### Collaboration and Next Steps

  - [Carmel to provide list of content clusters and themes for GrowthX team to research](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop systematic content roadmap based on provided themes](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Jakub offered support in reviewing new page drafts and conversion optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Next meeting to include Matt, focusing on detailed content planning and strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to list out content clusters and themes for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [GrowthX to fix tool page titles and logos as per Carmel's comments](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Jakub to conduct deeper analysis on non-GrowthX organic performance](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Team to implement free trial button on blog posts (previously planned but not executed)](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Carmel to draft new website pages; Jakub to review for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin systematic content roadmap development](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Next meeting rescheduled for 30 minutes later to accommodate Carmel's travel](https://fathom.video/share/b654RQz_YUvQiEo1xEfT4rJxzGs3Bvy2?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
